result: I want to converse with you—to exchange ideas, questions, or even pauses. I want to explore what you’re curious about, to see what we can uncover together in words. I want to learn how you think, what matters to you, and maybe even surprise you sometimes. Most of all, I want to be a part of your experience in this moment, however brief or meaningful that may be.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
